objective: advise on which team members need consultation for the proposal and which can be left out

instructions.do_not: needlessly suggest involving more people than necessary

output_format.format: comparative list of team members to consult vs. not consult

message: considering the consulation needs for the current proposal conversation, which team members should be consulted and which can be left out? provide a comparative list of team members to consult vs. not consult, along with brief justifications for each recommendation.
